blocks.text: A few housekeeping notes before the long weekend. We are closing at noon on Friday and reopening Wednesday, so set your out-of-office replies and clear anything time-sensitive before you leave. Michelle Rose is refreshing the emergency contact sheet this week; if your details have changed, get them to her by Thursday. And the shared refrigerator gets emptied Friday afternoon, so take home anything you want to keep.

Coverage over the break, in case something comes up: Michael Morris is first point of contact for office and building matters, Michelle Rose is watching the general mailbox, and Julie Hill is reachable by phone for anything that genuinely cannot wait. Otherwise, enjoy the time off, everyone.
